assetId.title: assetId
assetId.description: The Salesforce ID of the asset to install.

accountId.title: accountId
accountId.description: The Salesforce ID of the customer account.

serialNumber.title: serialNumber
serialNumber.description: The serial number of the device to be installed.

deviceESN.title: deviceESN
deviceESN.description: The Electronic Serial Number of the device.

vehicleName.title: vehicleName
vehicleName.description: The name of the vehicle where the device will be installed.

customerName.title: customerName
customerName.description: The name of the customer for the work order.

customerPhone.title: customerPhone
customerPhone.description: The customer phone number for installer contact.

deliveryAddress.title: deliveryAddress
deliveryAddress.description: The address where the installation will take place.
